verses.3: and have cast lots for my people,
verses.4: “Yes, and what are you to me, Tyre and Sidon,
verses.5: Because you have taken my silver and my gold,
verses.6: and have sold the children of Judah and the children of Jerusalem to the sons of the Greeks,
verses.7: Behold, I will stir them up out of the place where you have sold them,
verses.8: and I will sell your sons and your daughters into the hands of the children of Judah,
verses.11: Hurry and come, all you surrounding nations,
verses.14: Multitudes, multitudes in the valley of decision!
verses.15: The sun and the moon are darkened,
verses.16: The LORD will roar from Zion,
verses.17: “So you will know that I am the LORD, your God,
verses.18: It will happen in that day,
verses.20: But Judah will be inhabited forever,
